title: Entity type definition (graph contract)
description: Describes how a domain entity maps into prometheus-entity-management: graph key, id field, and optional metadata for code generation and validation. This is a skills/consuming-app contract, not a runtime Zustand schema.

idField.description: Property name on the wire object that holds EntityId (commonly "id" or "uuid").

displayName.description: Human label for UI and logging.

description.description: Optional documentation for agents and developers.

fields.description: Known fields on the normalized entity record (server-shaped keys).

name.description: Object key on the entity payload.

valueType.description: Semantic type for forms, columns, and filters.

enumValues.description: Allowed values when valueType is enum.

relationTargetType.description: If valueType is relationId or relationIdArray, the target EntityType.

listQueryKeyTemplate.description: Example query key array pattern for useEntityList (stringifiable segments).

normalizerNotes.description: Hints for mapping API/GQL shape to flat Record<string, unknown> graph rows.
